name: io.github.Rajeev-Shyam/quellgeist-logs
description: Read-only MCP server exposing query_logs over a structured JSONL incident log. Part of Quellgeist first-line incident triage.

environmentVariables.name: QG_LOG_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Path to the JSONL incident log to read (default: demo/incident_logs.jsonl, resolved against the working directory).
